meta.title: GEONYX | Which System Is Right for You?
meta.description: Interactive configurator – answer 4 questions and find out which GEONYX system (ARMOR, CHEM, THERM, HYDRO) is optimal for your facility.

title: WHICH GEONYX SYSTEM IS RIGHT FOR YOU?
subtitle: 4 questions. Engineering recommendation.

q1.text: What type of facility are you planning for?

q2.text: What is the main load on the floor?

q3.text: What is the main problem or risk?
q3.a5: Planning a new facility (no current problem)

result.title: ENGINEERING RECOMMENDATION
result.ctaProject: PLAN A PROJECT WITH AN ENGINEER

armor.why: Your facility requires resistance to extreme mechanical loads. GEONYX ARMOR builds a monolithic mineral matrix with strength over 110 MPa – resistant to forklifts, VNA aisles and point loads without dusting or deterioration.

chem.why: Your environment involves aggressive chemicals, oils or hygienic requirements. GEONYX CHEM builds a dense chemically resistant matrix, stable at pH 0–14, with no absorption and easy to clean.

therm.why: Your process involves extreme heat, sparks or thermal cycles. GEONYX THERM is a geopolymer matrix stable up to +1200°C, with A1fl fire classification and resistance to thermal shock.

hydro.why: Your facility is exposed to water, capillary moisture or hydrostatic pressure. GEONYX HYDRO provides crystalline waterproofing with W20 impermeability, even under negative pressure.
